_publications._publicationTitle: Using antisense oligonucleotides for the physiological modulation of the alternative splicing of NF1 exon 23a during PC12 neuronal differentiation.

_contextSnippet: Upon the addition of basic Fibroblast Growth Factor (bFGF) and a temperature increase, H19-7/IGF-IR cells extended neurites and changed morphology similarly to PC12 differentiating cells
details: Upon addition of basic Fibroblast Growth Factor (bFGF) and temperature increase, H19-7/IGF-IR cells extended neurites and changed morphology similarly to PC12 differentiating cells
